name: Quote with high open count flagged as engaged
description: Customer opens a quote 5 times in two days but hasn't decided. /quotes should treat opens >=3 as a strong engagement signal and call attention to the card.

persona.name: Lena Park
persona.context: Wants to know which prospects are warm so she can call instead of waiting.

preconditions: Quote 'Kim — kitchen cabinets' has 5 opens, sent 2 days ago, no decision

steps.expect: Kim card in 'sent' stage shows an 'engaged' badge or accent; opens count is prominent (e.g. '5 opens')
Detail shows open history with timestamps (5 entries) — useful for picking when to call
tel: link initiates the dial on mobile or shows the number prominently on desktop

evaluationCriteria.check: Engaged accent is energizing (warm color, badge) — not alarming like an error
Highest-engagement quotes float to the top of their stage
Open events are de-duped within a 60-second window so a single visit isn't counted as 3
'5 opens' is in the card's accessible name, not just a visual badge
